name: Magnum Hunter Resources Corp.
description: Magnum Hunter Resources Corporation was an independent oil and natural gas company engaged in the exploration, development, and production of crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids. Headquartered in Irving, Texas, the company focused its operations primarily on unconventional shale plays, including the Marcellus and Utica shales in the Appalachian Basin. Following a period of financial restructuring and emergence from Chapter 11 bankruptcy in 2016, the company rebranded itself as Blue Ridge Mountain Resources, Inc. in early 2017 to signify a new strategic direction and leadership.
